title: lonicera alpigena subsp. glutinosa
intro: Lonicera alpigena subsp. glutinosa, also known as the Himalayan honeysuckle, is a species of flowering plant in the honeysuckle family native to the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lonicera alpigena subsp. glutinosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cough and sore throat, and act as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
